LE FOVÉA Suivant une méthode décrite par Hecht, l'auteur a déterminé le cours de l'adaptation fovéale à l'obscurité dans des conditions d'observation monoculaire et binoculaire. Puisque du processus est měme les deux on conclut qu'il n'y nulle sommation binoculaire fovea. On présente ici un résumé critique quelques-unes contributions plus importantes ce sujet. Le rôle l'aire la pupille problème type discuté. montre quand contrôlée (par l'usage pupilles artificielles) en outre, que seuils pour yeux sont approximativement ceux l'oeil sensitif. Referat EINE UNTERSUCHUNG BINOCULARER SUMMIERUNG. DIE FOVEA Der Verfasser bestimmte den Verlauf der fovealen Dunkeladaption unter monokularen und binokularen Sehens. V-Net: Fully Convolutional Neural Networks for Volumetric Medical Image Segmentation

Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) have been recently employed to solve problems from both the computer vision and medical image analysis fields. Despite their popularity, most approaches are only able process 2D images while data used in clinical practice consists of 3D volumes. As the core building block of vision transformers, attention is a powerful tool to capture long-range dependency. However, such power comes at cost: it incurs huge computation burden and heavy memory footprint as pairwise token interaction across all spatial locations computed. A series works attempt alleviate this problem by introducing handcrafted content-agnostic sparsity into attention, restricting operation be inside local windows, axial stripes, or dilated windows. Specifically, for query, irrelevant key-value pairs are first filtered out coarse region level, then fine-grained token-to-token applied in union remaining candidate regions (i.e., routed regions). We provide simple yet effective implementation proposed bilevel which utilizes save both while involving only GPU-friendly dense matrix multiplications. Built new general transformer, named BiFormer, presented.
